tagline: Scheduled tasks for consumer entitlement users: Consumer entitlement users can now create scheduled tasks without needing the SQL entitlement.
what_it_does: Scheduled tasks for consumer entitlement users: Consumer entitlement users can now create scheduled tasks without needing the SQL entitlement. Chat in Genie One is a unified, full screen natural language interface for business users to ask data questions. It first searches available Genie Agents for a match, then searches across dashboards, queries, and metric views.
why_it_matters: This generates more accurate responses and reduces latency by reducing the amount of data Genie One needs to crawl and query.
key_takeaway: Scheduled tasks for consumer entitlement users: Consumer entitlement users can now create scheduled tasks without needing the SQL entitlement.
